common_lang.name: Common Language
common_lang.hint: The common language. In default D&D 5e, this is Common.

remove_standard.name: Remove Standard Languages
remove_standard.hint: Enable to remove all standard languages except for the common language.

remove_exotic.name: Remove Exotic Languages
remove_exotic.hint: Enable to remove all exotic languages except for Primordial.

remove_primordial.name: Remove Primordial Languages
remove_primordial.hint: Enable to remove all Primordial languages.

remove_cant.name: Remove Thieves' Cant
remove_cant.hint: Enable to remove Thieves' Cant (NOT RECOMMENDED).
